title: invoice — helper functions
description: Ergonomic helpers for creating invoices, computing aging, and rendering PDFs. All helpers are thin wrappers around bound services — never business logic. Callers who need transactional guarantees should invoke the bound services directly (via container-resolved injection).

helpers.signature: create_draft_invoice(Tenant $tenant, Model $customer, ?Membership $membership = null, ?array $lines = [], string $currency = null, string $paymentTerms = 'net_30', string $series = 'INV'): Invoice
helpers.purpose: Imperative invoice creation. Creates a draft invoice + freezes billing_address from customer.profile + adds any provided lines. Returns the created Invoice. Reserved for support tooling + tests — production code uses the CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated hook.

Synchronous finalize. Runs the FinalizeInvoiceJob steps inline (verifies tax calculations, computes totals, freezes state, transitions to open). Returns the finalized Invoice. Dispatches GenerateInvoicePDFJob + SendInvoiceEmailJob asynchronously unless sendEmail=false.

Generate the next invoice number for a tenant + year (default current year). Uses Postgres advisory lock for gap-free sequential numbering. Returns the formatted string (2026-000001 or INV-2026-000001).
Same pattern for credit note numbers. Returns 'CN-2026-000001'.
Render the invoice PDF as a binary string. Reserved for previewing (no S3 upload); production PDF generation goes through GenerateInvoicePDFJob which uploads to S3.
Returns the aging summary as { current: cents, 1_30: cents, 31_60: cents, 61_90: cents, 91_plus: cents }. Optional customer scope. As-of defaults to today.
Returns revenue-report data: [{ period: '2026-01', invoiced_cents, collected_cents, ar_balance_cents }, ...]. groupBy IN ('day', 'week', 'month', 'item_type').
Returns tax-collected data: [{ jurisdiction: 'US-CA', tax_amount_cents, invoice_count }, ...]. Feeds VAT/GST/sales-tax return preparation.

helpers.signature: issue_credit_note(Invoice $originalInvoice, int $amountCents, string $reason, ?string $reasonNote = null, ?User $issuedBy = null): CreditNote
helpers.purpose: Issue a credit note against a paid/partially-paid invoice. Runs the observer chain synchronously. Returns the created CreditNote (status='draft' initially; PDF generation is async).
Apply an issued credit note. appliedToType IN ('refund', 'next_invoice', 'customer_balance'). Transitions status issued → applied.
Returns the list of customer_id values a user may access via invoice.enforce_customer_scope. Includes user.id + any athlete_ids where user is guardian. Cached via mkt:customer-scope key.

Extracts the billing_address snapshot from a customer model. For User: reads user.profile; for Athlete: reads athlete.guardian.profile; for Organization: reads organization.address. Returns the address as an array matching schemas/address-snapshot.embed.json.
Returns days past due (0 if not past due). asOf defaults to today.

notes: Helpers deliberately delegate — testing swaps the bound service to a stub, and every helper follows.
No helper directly touches the DB — everything routes through repositories or services. Keeps the boundary clean.

The create_draft_invoice + finalize_invoice helpers are intentionally NOT the primary invoice-creation path. Production code registers listeners on membership::MembershipCreated + membership::MembershipRenewed; the helpers exist for support scripts + one-off backfills + tests.
